integration.title: Seamless Integration
integration.description: Works with your existing practice management systems and review platforms

questions.question: How does the review generation process work?
questions.answer: Our system integrates with your practice management software to automatically send review requests after patient appointments. The timing is customizable, but typically occurs within 24-48 hours of the visit when the experience is fresh in the patient's mind. Requests are sent via text message or email with a direct link to leave a review on your preferred platform. The messaging is personalized with the patient's name and can be customized to reflect your practice's voice and branding.

questions.question: How do you help manage negative reviews?
questions.answer: We provide a multi-layered approach to negative reviews. First, our system includes an internal feedback option that catches potential negative reviews before they go public, allowing you to address concerns directly. For negative reviews that do appear online, we provide real-time alerts, response templates, and best practice guidelines for addressing concerns professionally. Our platform also includes sentiment analysis to help identify recurring issues that might be affecting patient satisfaction.

questions.question: Is the system compliant with healthcare privacy regulations?
questions.answer: Yes, our reputation management platform is fully HIPAA-compliant. We've implemented comprehensive security measures including encryption, access controls, and secure data handling protocols. The system is designed to never disclose protected health information in any public-facing communications. All review requests and responses operate within a framework that respects patient privacy while still enabling authentic reviews and transparent communication.

questions.question: Which review platforms do you monitor?
questions.answer: Our Professional and Enterprise plans monitor all major review platforms relevant to dental practices, including Google Business Profile, Facebook, Yelp, Healthgrades, WebMD, Zocdoc, Vitals, RateMDs, and Dentist.com. The Essentials plan focuses on the highest-impact platforms (Google and Facebook). Our system aggregates reviews from all these sources into a single dashboard, providing a comprehensive view of your online reputation across the entire digital ecosystem.

questions.question: How do you help showcase positive reviews?
questions.answer: We provide customizable review widgets that can be embedded on your website to display your best reviews from multiple platforms in real-time. These widgets can be filtered to show only 4-5 star reviews and can be customized to match your website's design. Additionally, we offer social media integration to automatically share positive reviews to your practice's social profiles (with patient permission). For practices with physical locations, we can also generate printed materials highlighting top reviews for your office.

reviews.name: Dr. James Wilson
reviews.comment: Before implementing this reputation system, we had only 12 Google reviews with a 3.8 average rating. Within six months, we've grown to over 120 reviews with a 4.9 average. New patients consistently mention that our strong online reviews were a deciding factor in choosing our practice. The system has been incredibly easy to use, and the automatic review requests save our front desk staff hours of work each week.

reviews.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
reviews.comment: The reputation platform helped us identify a recurring issue with our billing process that was causing patient frustration. By catching these concerns through the private feedback feature, we were able to fix the problem before it generated negative public reviews. Our review volume has increased by 300%, and we've maintained a 4.8-star average across all platforms. The ROI on this investment has been outstanding.

reviews.name: Maria Rodriguez
reviews.comment: Managing our online reputation across multiple locations used to be a full-time job. This platform has automated the entire process and given us invaluable insights into patient satisfaction at each location. The competitive analysis feature has been particularly helpful in understanding how we compare to other practices in each neighborhood. We've seen a 40% increase in new patient calls directly attributed to our improved online presence.

cta.title: Ready to Build a 5-Star Reputation?
